subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Haqq
subcodes.first_line: O concourse of the Ultimately Real One! The Truly Real One has, in very Truth, been made manifest from the horizon of Ultimately Real
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا ملا الحق قد ظهر الحق عن افق الحق فی  هذالحق  الذی طلع عن مطلع الحق
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power of the Manifestation of God, @station of the Manifestation of God
